targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (vcenter_uuid, datacenter_moid)) AS "Datacenters" FROM mv_vmware_datacenter_latest WHERE ('$datacenter' = '' OR datacenter_name IN ($datacenter))
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Clusters" FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest WHERE ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_hosts), 0) AS "Hosts" FROM mv_vmware_datacenter_latest WHERE ('$datacenter' = '' OR datacenter_name IN ($datacenter))
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "VMs" FROM mv_vmware_vm_latest WHERE ('$vm' = '' OR vm_name IN ($vm))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Powered On" FROM mv_vmware_vm_latest WHERE power_state = 'poweredOn'
AND ('$vm' = '' OR vm_name IN ($vm))

SELECT datacenter_name, COALESCE(cpu_usage_percent, 0) AS "CPU %" FROM mv_vmware_datacenter_latest
WHERE ('$datacenter' = '' OR datacenter_name IN ($datacenter))
ORDER BY "CPU %" DESC

SELECT COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) AS cluster_name, COALESCE(cpu_usage_avg_percent, 0) AS "CPU %"
FROM mv_vmware_cluster_metrics_latest
WHERE ('$cluster' = '' OR COALESCE(cluster_name, cluster_name_discovery) IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY "CPU %" DESC
LIMIT 15

SELECT vcenter_name AS "vCenter", datacenter_name AS "Datacenter",
  total_clusters AS "Clusters", total_hosts AS "Hosts",
  total_cpu_ghz AS "CPU (GHz)", total_memory_gb AS "Mem (GB)",
  cpu_usage_percent AS "CPU %", memory_usage_percent AS "Mem %"
FROM mv_vmware_datacenter_latest
WHERE ('$datacenter' = '' OR datacenter_name IN ($datacenter))
ORDER BY vcenter_name, datacenter_name

list.label: vCenter
list.name: vcenter
list.query: SELECT name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter ORDER BY name

list.label: Datacenter
list.name: datacenter
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT dc.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON dc.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
WHERE '$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Location
list.name: location
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Cluster
list.name: cluster
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT cl.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter)) AND ('$location' = '' OR SPLIT_PART(cl.name, '-', 1) IN ($location))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: Host
list.name: host
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT h.name FROM discovery_vmware_inventory_host h
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_vcenter vc ON h.vcenter_uuid::text = vc.vcenter_uuid::text
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_cluster cl ON h.vcenter_uuid::text = cl.vcenter_uuid::text AND h.parent_component_moid = cl.component_moid
JOIN discovery_vmware_inventory_datacenter dc ON cl.vcenter_uuid::text = dc.vcenter_uuid::text AND cl.parent_component_moid = dc.component_moid
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR vc.name IN ($vcenter)) AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR dc.name IN ($datacenter)) AND ('$cluster' = '' OR cl.name IN ($cluster))
ORDER BY 1

list.label: VM
list.name: vm
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT inv.vm_name FROM mv_vmware_vm_latest inv
WHERE ('$vcenter' = '' OR inv.vcenter_name IN ($vcenter))
AND ('$datacenter' = '' OR inv.datacenter_name IN ($datacenter))
AND ('$cluster' = '' OR inv.cluster_name IN ($cluster))
AND ('$host' = '' OR inv.host_name IN ($host))
ORDER BY 1
